did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a commentary discussing the use of Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) and teledermoscopy for diagnosing basal cell carcinoma and melanoma. It describes OCT as a noninvasive imaging technology and teledermoscopy as a store-and-forward method. There is no mention of using artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, or computer vision algorithms to obtain results; the diagnostic processes described rely on human interpretation of imaging data or standard clinical evaluation.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
